headline: Should Salesforce’s Cross‑Cloud AI Agent Strategy With Google and Unisys Reshape CRM’s Investment Narrative?
summary: In recent weeks, Unisys announced an expanded collaboration with Salesforce to deploy Agentforce 360 across more than 120 countries, automating millions of annual service tickets and supporting a global network of technicians with AI-enhanced field service tools. At the same time, Salesforce and Google Cloud deepened their partnership to let AI agents operate seamlessly across both platforms without copying data, highlighting Salesforce’s push to make its Agentforce and Data 360 stack a...
